rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers substantially different active set than requested as it includes sections on motivation, method, theoretical sketch, experiments, relation to prior work, notes on substantive changes, items I could not verify from the artifact, which are not part of the original draft.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original by suggesting potential downstream-harm note for the body (not the abstract).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
